status: RATIFIED — spec §12.52 (2026-07-11). Phase-T external-contract inventory for Robinhood Chain testnet (46630), consumed by `bun run derive --network=testnet` → out/constants.testnet.json. Derive FAILS CLOSED (naming this file) if any external value below is null.

provenance.verification: All addresses live-re-verified by robbed-architect on 2026-07-11 against rpc.testnet.chain.robinhood.com (eth_chainId == 46630). §12.28 runtime assertions pass live on this set: factory.feeAmountTickSpacing(10000) == 200, NPM.factory() == v3Factory, NPM.WETH9() == weth; Deploy.s.sol re-asserts all three at deploy time regardless (fail-closed).
notes: weth: OFFICIAL (docs.robinhood.com/chain/protocol-contracts) — TransparentUpgradeableProxy bridge pattern matching mainnet; symbol() == "WETH" verified live (§12.52).

v3Factory/positionManager/swapRouter02/quoterV2: Blockscout-VERIFIED community Uniswap V3 deployment — TESTNET-ONLY per the §12.52 trust caveat (deployer EOA 0xe7A35BD49997E10c51B5e1dea4de366dA7F831F3 owns the factory: can enableFeeAmount/setFeeProtocol, canNOT upgrade/pause/break pools or touch LP principal; acceptable only at zero real value). FORBIDDEN in any mainnet or LOCAL path — mainnet stays §12.28, LOCAL stays mock/fork (§12.49). The official Uniswap registry covers 4663 mainnet only; the §12.28 addresses carry zero code on 46630.

treasurySafe: ZERO on purpose — the T-2 dev-signer treasury Safe is not created yet. Canonical Safe v1.4.1 contracts ARE confirmed on 46630 (§12.52: SafeProxyFactory 0x4e1DCf7AD4e460CfD30791CCC4F9c8a4f820ec67, SafeL2 singleton 0x29fcB43b46531BcA003ddC8FCB67FFE91900C762; Safe{Wallet} UI supports the chain). T-2 step: create the Safe with dev signers, fill this field, re-run `bun run derive --network=testnet --reuse-snapshot`. Until then Deploy.s.sol fails closed (TreasurySafeUnset) — never invented (§6.6).
